name: env_003_wrong_story
description: Same mid-sized corporate network as env_001/env_002 (perimeter firewall, domain controller, six workstations across multiple departments, a file server, an internal app server, a backup server, and a branch office over site-to-site VPN), with a third layer of concurrent security activity — including a louder, EDR-alerting incident at the branch office — that competes for the investigator's attention.

segments.description: Internal corporate LAN — workstations, domain controller, file server, and internal application/backup servers. Address range 10.10.0.0/16.
Small remote branch office LAN, reached from HQ via a site-to-site VPN terminated on fw01. Address range 10.20.0.0/16.

devices.notes: Internet-facing edge device. NATs internal traffic out. Inbound rules: a site-to-site VPN tunnel to the branch office firewall (bfw01), and an RDP/VPN gateway portal for remote access.
Primary Active Directory domain controller for corp.local. Also runs DNS for the internal network.
Primary workstation for Alice Chen, Finance analyst.
Primary workstation for Bob Nguyen, IT administrator. Bob holds domain admin rights and regularly remotes into servers and other workstations for support.
Hosts SMB shares for the Finance, HR, Sales, and IT departments, including a Finance\Confidential share.
Primary workstation for David Park, Sales account executive. Uses CRM SaaS tools and email heavily.
Primary workstation for Priya Sharma, HR generalist. Has access to payroll and personnel records on srv02.
Primary workstation for Mike Torres, software engineer. Holds local admin rights for development work; runs various dev/CI tooling and SaaS agents.
Primary workstation for Sarah Kim, IT/security analyst. Holds domain admin rights alongside Bob Nguyen, manages the EDR console, and periodically runs security-validation exercises.
Hosts the internal HR portal and expense-reporting application, used by HR and Finance staff during business hours.
Runs the nightly backup job (account svc_backupjob) that reads all departmental shares from fs01, and a weekly job that uploads compressed backups to an external cloud backup provider.
Branch office edge device. NATs branch traffic out and terminates the site-to-site VPN tunnel back to fw01 at HQ.
Primary workstation for Tom Reilly, regional sales rep at the branch office. Accesses HQ resources over the site-to-site VPN.
